title: Shadow's Cookings
description: Cookings is a simple alternative to Farmer's Delight for 1.20.6.
body:
I wish Farmer's Delight was updated past 1.20.1. Do you too? Well, this mod is for you. Cookings is an alternative to Farmer's Delight for NeoForge 1.20.6. Though not as good as Farmer's Delight, it's a feasible alternative.

Currently this mod adds pizzas, burgers, Sculk stews, clay plates, hardened clay plates, grinding stone wheels, salt dough, flour, tomatoes, olives, lettuce, Appetitol (a fictional drug that makes you hungry) and regenerating (golden) burgers, but I plan to add sandwiches, salads and more in the near future.

**Cookings is the intellectual property of Lord Shadow IV (formerly shadowEpicGamer3375), and as such, is protected by copyright law. Cookings may not be altered or redistributed without direct permission from Lord Shadow IV.**
